summary: BUILDER applied both actionable MEDIUM suggestions from iter 2 (S101 Storage_reserves→GIF1→Seed_Size swap; S102 LEC2→FUS3 mutual maturation activation). GIF1 coverage rose 0.25→0.38, FUS3 0.75→0.88, LEC2 0.71→0.86, ABI3 1.00→0.89. Remaining under-0.30 nodes (WRI1=0.00, TTG2=0.20) are documented literature_gaps with no curated path BUILDER can act on. Seven remaining HIGH-confidence inter-network rejections all have defensible structural reasons (Perception Gate purity for E106; routing via BZR1 for E101/E102; AGB1 orphan-prevention for E133; hub-overload for E074/E170; positive-self-loop risk for E212). Network is biologically defensible at peer-review standard — approving for Step 3 PERTURBATION.

applied_correctly: S101 (with Storage_reserves removal as cleanest implementation)

rejected_with_documented_reason.reason: literature_gap — cannot act without curated downstream

newly_introduced_issues: FUS3↔LEC2 positive feedback (S102) — monitor in validation. Damping=0.7 expected to stabilise but LEC2 OE may amplify.
Storage_reserves removal (S101) means LAFL→reserves cascade no longer modelled as a distinct phenotype activator. Acceptable since ABI3/ABI4 still influence phenotype via ABI5 and other paths.

pathway_completeness.justification: All major pathways present at workable depth: GA-DELLA, BR Perception Gate, Auxin biosynthesis-signaling-PRC2 crosstalk, CK biosynthesis-degradation, ABA/maturation, IKU/HAIKU, PRC2/imprinting, ubiquitin-proteasome, G-protein, miR396-GRF-GIF1. Sugar/T6P/TOR/SnRK1 still absent (literature_gap). WRI1/seed-oil arc still absent (literature_gap). Removing Storage_reserves slightly reduced explicit coverage of the maturation-storage arm, but ABI3/ABI4/FUS3 still influence phenotype via ABI5⊣Seed_Size.

mechanistic_depth.justification: Cascades remain layered. New LEC2→FUS3 edge completes the canonical LAFL mutual-activation core. GA⊣DELLA→ANT→Integument_Growth→Seed_Size, BR→BRI1⊣BIN2⊣BZR1→multiple-targets, Auxin→TIR1→ARF2 cascades all preserved.

motif_coverage.justification: Perception Gate clean for both GA and BR (single-outgoing-edge ligand to receptor). Multi-Output Scaffold strongly used (BZR1 with 9 targets, MAX-equivalent role). Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance for ABA, CK, GA. Coherent Feed-Forward in ABI cascade and BR multi-target. Mutual-activation maturation TF loop now captured (LEC2↔FUS3) per Motif 2 negative/positive feedback patterns.

cascade_balance.justification: Source % 43.0% — within softened 30–50% target. Most non-source nodes 1–6 inputs. Major aggregator hubs (Integument_Growth=16, Endosperm_Proliferation=9, Seed_Size=7, PRC2=6) are over the 7-cap but justified as process/phenotype aggregators. Removed Storage_reserves was a thin 2-input aggregator that didn’t add cascade structure.

composite_node_handling.justification: DELLA composite handles GAI/RGA/RGL family cleanly. PRC2 composite intact. Other paralog families remain split appropriately.

hub_completeness.justification: Seed_Size phenotype now has full set of effector-class representatives: Integument_Growth (maternal), Endosperm_Proliferation (filial), Ovule_size (ovule), AGG3 (G-protein), GIF1 (cell-proliferation co-activator), ABA (hormone), ABI5 (ABA-effector TF). Both promoting and repressing arms balanced.

topology_hazards.justification: Two positive feedback loops now present: AGB1→AGG3→? (no return loop — AGG3 doesn’t output to AGB1 in the network; SAFE) and FUS3↔LEC2 (mutual activation, NEW IN ITER 3 — monitor). DA1/DA2/EOD1 negative feedback remains stabilising. GA and BR Perception Gates clean. Auxin still has 4 outgoing edges (partial gate violation). Score drops from 4 to 3 specifically because of the LEC2↔FUS3 introduction — will be a known limitation flagged for REFINEMENT if validation shows unexpected LEC2 OE behaviour.

evidence_quality.justification: All edges have specific mechanism strings and curated DOIs. New iter-3 edges cite Liu 2020 (E149) and Stone 2008 (E120). Authors and years populated.

phenotype_audit.justification: Seed_Size has 5 activators (at hard cap, balanced across maternal, filial, ovule, G-protein, proliferation) and 2 inhibitors (ABA hormone + ABI5 effector TF). Both arms strong, all major effector classes represented. Direct AGG3 and GIF1 effects now captured rather than only via process intermediates.

rejected_edges_review.justification: Every remaining HIGH-conf inter-network rejection has a defensible structural reason documented in the build logs: E106 intentionally removed for GA Perception Gate; E101/E102 routed via BZR1 to preserve BR Perception Gate; E074/E170 deferred for Integument_Growth hub overload (already 16 inputs); E133 deferred to avoid AGB1 orphaning; E212 deferred for positive-self-loop risk. Each is the kind of decision a peer reviewer would accept.

key_player_density.justification: WRI1 (0.00) and TTG2 (0.20) are the only remaining sub-0.30 cases and both are documented literature_gaps — no curated path BUILDER can act on. GIF1 rose 0.25→0.38; ANT 0.50; SEEDSTICK 0.50; DELLA 0.40 (newly added). Major hormones all 0.56–0.83. Per Anti-Pattern 6, the documented exclusion rationale is sufficient for these literature-bounded cases. Score 4 (would be 5 once Step 1 fills the WRI1 and TTG2 gaps).

suggestions.description: WRI1 connection still needed to enable seed-oil arc
suggestions.biological_justification: Step 1 backlog item from iter 1 / iter 2. No change.
suggestions.implementation: Step 1 LITERATURE REVIEW must add a curated WRI1→in-network edge.

literature_gaps: TTG2 upstream regulators (TOP1α, UPF1) need curation
TPS1 / T6P / TOR / SnRK1 sugar-energy axis missing entirely
GID1A/GID1B GA receptors not in curated_edges as candidate nodes
RGL2 (specific DELLA member) referenced in E131 but not curated as separate node
ABCG17/18 ABA transporters referenced but not curated
approval_rationale: All HIGH-priority suggestions from iter 1 either applied (6/6) or rejected with documented structural rationale (the rejected rationale was reaffirmed in iter 2). Both actionable MEDIUM suggestions from iter 2 applied in iter 3. Remaining suggestions are exclusively LOW-priority literature_gaps that BUILDER cannot act on — they belong in the Step 1 backlog. Mean rubric 4.27/5 with no dimension below 3. The network is biologically defensible at peer-review standard, has clean Perception Gates for GA and BR, full HAIKU pathway, integrated G-protein and GRF-GIF1 hubs, and balanced phenotype effector representation. Approving for Step 3 PERTURBATION.
